FORECASTED_MOVES_POWER.title: Forecasted Moves
FORECASTED_MOVES_POWER.description: This unit's upcoming intent has been foretold.
OMNISCIENCE_DOUBLE_POWER.title: Omniscience Double
OMNISCIENCE_DOUBLE_POWER.description: This effect causes the related Omniscience resolution to occur one additional time.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_MOONLIT_TRANSFER: At end of turn, transfer one of your debuffs to all enemies.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_NONEXISTENCE_AUR: Whenever you play a Power card, gain [blue]8[] Block; future powers applied to you are doubled; your Power cards cost [blue]1[] less (minimum 0).
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_ORB_FOR_ALL_POWE: Whenever you channel an orb, each other player channels the same orb type.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_TEACH_AND_LEARN_: Whenever you play a Power card and gain a power from it, each other player gains the same power.
